idle.startPose: relaxed fighting idle stance, fists up, slight breathing
idle.endPose: relaxed fighting idle stance, fists up, weight shifted
idle.motion: subtle idle breathing bob, fighting stance

walk.startPose: mid stride walking forward, left foot forward
walk.endPose: mid stride walking forward, right foot forward
walk.motion: walking forward in a loop, marching gait

attack1.endPose: fully extended straight punch forward, arm out
attack1.motion: throws a fast straight punch forward then retracts

attack2.motion: spins into a roundhouse kick then recovers

intro.endPose: confident entrance victory pose, taunting the camera
intro.motion: steps in and strikes a confident entrance pose

death.endPose: knocked out lying on the ground, defeated
death.motion: gets knocked back and collapses to the ground defeated

super.startPose: charging up a massive special move, energy gathering, dramatic glow
super.endPose: unleashing an explosive screen-filling special attack, huge energy blast
super.motion: unleashes an explosive screen-filling super special move with energy effects
